title: 🎯 Build the Flow
lead: Order the steps of each service channel in the correct sequence.

instructions.title: How it works
instructions.text: Select a channel, drag the steps to the correct order, and click Check. Complete all 6 channels to finish the exercise!

success.title: Congratulations!
success.text: You got all {total} steps of the {channel} flow right!

error.title: Almost there!
error.text: You got {correct} out of {total} steps right. Review the items marked in red.

completion.title: Exercise Completed!
completion.text: Congratulations! You have successfully completed all 6 service flows!

redes: Social Media Team monitors mentions, comments, and messages
Identifies demand and creates service in Salesforce
Directs to SAC or the Store according to the type
SAC handles the case and registers feedback in Salesforce
Social Media responds to the customer on the original channel
lojas: Store identifies request that requires continuity
SAC analyzes and contacts internal areas
SAC ensures final feedback to the customer
pessoal: Customer calls through IVR or initiates intercom
Makes immediate referral according to the occurrence
site: Customer fills out form on the website
Case is automatically created in Salesforce
SAC classifies and directs to the responsible area
SAC provides feedback to the customer
app: Customer sends request via the App
Case is automatically created in Salesforce
SAC classifies and forwards when applicable
SAC provides feedback to the customer
email: Case is automatically registered in Salesforce
SAC identifies and classifies the type of request
SAC provides feedback to the customer
